generated_from: SOVAH updated bundle catalog for Shopify, quiz and chatbot
notes: Sun Protection SPF50 Stick is removed from all bundle_products.
SPF/sunscreen is not part of any routine bundle.
Full routine names are simplified: Dry Skin Routine, Sensitive Skin Routine, Acne Routine, Combination Skin Routine, Normal Skin Routine, Dull Skin Routine, Aging Skin Routine.
Simple Blemish Control Routine is renamed to Simple Acne Routine.
Quiz routes are broad semantic intent signals, not strict exact-match keyword rules.
Each routine includes normal route signals and typo/misspelling signals for quiz/chat support.
global_ai_routing_rules: Prefer simple_routine if the customer asks for simple, starter, basic, quick, minimal, 2-step or few products.
Prefer full_routine if the customer asks for complete, full, best, uitgebreide routine, complete set or everything they need.
If acne/pimples/breakouts are clearly mentioned, route acne higher than oily unless the message is only about shine/oil.
If sensitive/reactive/redness is clearly mentioned, be conservative and prefer Sensitive Skin Routine or Simple Sensitive Skin Routine.
If dry/tight/flaky/dehydrated is clearly mentioned, route to Dry Skin Routine unless the user specifically asks for simple; then explain there is no simple dry variant in this catalog unless created.
If dull/tired/lack of glow is mentioned, route to Dull Skin Routine or Simple Dull Skin Routine.
Do not recommend SPF as part of a bundle, because SPF has intentionally been removed from bundle_products.

bundles.name: Dry Skin Routine
quiz_route: my face feels dry after washing

ai_routing_support.intent: Recommend this full routine when the customer wants a complete routine for dry, tight, flaky or dehydrated skin.
ai_routing_support.use_as: semantic intent signals, not strict exact-match keywords
ai_routing_support.routing_rule: Prefer a simple_routine when the user asks for simple, starter, basic, quick or 2-step. Prefer a full_routine when the user asks for complete, full, best, uitgebreid or a complete routine.
ai_routing_support.do_not_route_when: Do not route only on one overlapping word if the full message clearly points to another concern.

bundles.chat_route: Recommend this full routine when the customer wants a complete routine for dry, tight, flaky or dehydrated skin.

morning: Breng Hydrating Toner aan op licht vochtige huid.
Gebruik Double Hydration Boost Gel + HA als extra hydratatiestap.
Sluit af met Moisturising Day Cream.
evening: Gebruik Double Hydration Boost Gel + HA als extra hydratatie nodig is.
Sluit af met Ceramide Barrier Night Cream.
